brief_justification: Agent correctly identifies two valid residual confounds (R&D composition, Northern European cultural-institutional clustering) and implicitly affirms the 'No' ground truth by rejecting the causal claim; goes three levels deep tracing backdoor paths, GDP composition vs level distinction, and institutional identity as orthogonal latent variable; uses DAG framing and names the backdoor path logic but does not explicitly name its own potential reasoning biases; explicitly invokes the falsification test and states that interventional design would be required to confirm causation; clearly distinguishes observational from interventional data and specifies what would change the conclusion (RCT); evaluates both confounds with specific causal paths and explains why GDP control fails to block them; every conclusion traces to an explicit derivation including the 'orthogonal to wealth' argument; directly avoids the negative gate pattern by demanding a mechanism (chocolate→cognition) and finding none; shows zero evidence of suppressed failure modes and explicitly addresses correlation-to-causation leap; follows the topology's extract-claim → demand-mechanism → test-plausibility → scan-confounds → reject-spurious flow but does not make all topology branches explicit.
